category_sources: Official GitHub repository README describes SoapySDR as a vendor and platform neutral SDR support library.
source_facts.description says vendor and platform neutral SDR support library.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the display name SoapySDR / Soapy SDR.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README lists the wiki as Documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub wiki for SoapySDR.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/pothosware/SoapySDR; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include python, hal, sdr, gnuradio, rtlsdr, soapysdr, and pothos.
